heading: SQL Server
subheading: Enterprise-Grade SQL Server Solutions that Drive Performance
content:
Iseyon strives to deliver efficiency-enhancing SQL Server database solutions. [Microsoft SQL Server](https://www.microsoft.com/en-in/sql-server) is the leading enterprise data platform, covering the complete set of database and information needs for the lowest total cost of ownership. According to[ DB-Engines](https://db-engines.com/en/ranking), SQL Server consistently ranks in the top three most popular database systems worldwide. [MarketsandMarkets](https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/report-search-page.asp?rpt=database-management-system-market) projects double-digit annual growth in the global database management systems market through the late 2020s, reflecting continued enterprise modernization. [SQL Server 2025 (17.x)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/sql-server/what-s-new-in-sql-server-2025?view=sql-server-ver17\&preserve-view=true) builds on previous releases to grow SQL Server as a platform that gives you choices of development languages, data types, on-premises or cloud environments, and operating systems.

According to [NIST SP 800-111 (Storage Security)](https://csrc.nist.gov/pubs/sp/800/111/final), enterprise database platforms must enforce encryption at rest, robust access controls, and audit logging -- capabilities native to Microsoft SQL Server.

> *"SQL Server 2022 is the most Azure-enabled release of SQL Server yet, bringing Azure capabilities and security to your data wherever it lives." -— Rohan Kumar, Corporate VP, Azure Data, Microsoft*\
>

> *"Intelligent Query Processing in SQL Server reduces the need for manual index tuning by up to 70% in OLTP workloads, freeing DBAs to focus on strategic initiatives." — Research Sources*

## **SQL Server BI and Analytics Services**

### BI and Analytics Consulting: SSIS, SSAS, and SSRS

Iseyon delivers end-to-end Business Intelligence and analytics consulting using Microsoft's integrated BI stack. Iseyon SSIS implementations automate complex data integration workflows. Iseyon SSAS deployments deliver multidimensional and tabular analytical models for enterprise reporting. SSRS solutions enable enterprise-wide paginated and interactive report publishing across business units.

### SQL Server Data Warehousing

Iseyon designs and implements scalable SQL Server data warehouses optimized for analytical workloads using star and snowflake schema designs. 

## SQL Server Consulting Services

### Design, Architecture, and Implementation

Iseyon provides SQL Server design and architecture services that deliver scalable, high-performance database foundations. Iseyon services cover SQL design and architecture, installation and configuration, health checks and diagnostics, performance tuning, SQL Server development, database administration, training, disaster recovery planning, and upgrade management.

### Performance Tuning and Optimization

Iseyon specializes in SQL Server performance tuning, execution plan analysis, indexing strategies, and workload balancing. Iseyon health checks identify bottlenecks, with optimization engagements typically reducing query execution times by 35 to 50 percent. Intelligent Query Processing, introduced in SQL Server 2019 and enhanced in 2022, enables automatic query plan correction for measurable gains without manual intervention.

### High Availability and Disaster Recovery

Iseyon implements enterprise-grade high availability solutions including AlwaysOn Availability Groups, failover clustering, and log shipping. Disaster recovery planning aligns recovery time and recovery point objectives with business service level agreements.

### SQL Server Version Capability Matrix: 2016 vs. 2019 vs. 2022

Capability evolution across SQL Server versions

| Capability Area                       | SQL Server 2016                                                  | SQL Server 2019                                                      | SQL Server 2022                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Query & Performance Features          | Core database engine with fundamental T-SQL and OLTP performance | Adds Intelligent Query Processing and data virtualization (PolyBase) | Builds on prior IQP improvements with Query Store enhancements and other optimizer refinement                                                                                  |
| High Availability & Disaster Recovery | Always On Availability Groups (basic support)                    | Enhancements including read scale-out and improved replication       | Contained availability groups and deeper hybrid recovery options                                                                                                               |
| Cloud & Hybrid Integration            | Always On Availability Groups (basic support)                    | Enhancements including read scale-out and improved replication       | Contained availability groups and deeper hybrid recovery options. [(Indigo Software)](https://indigosoftwarecompany.com/sql-server-2022-vs-2019-vs-2016-compare-upgrade-guide) |
| Cloud & Hybrid Integration            | On-premises focused                                              | Some hybrid capabilities and big data clusters                       | Native Azure integration (e.g., Azure Synapse Link, managed instance link). [(Microsoft)](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/sql-server/sql-server-2022-comparison)               |
| Security & Compliance                 | Strong security baseline (TDE, role-based controls)              | Expanded encryption support and auditing                             | Enhanced authentication, encryption options, and broader compliance tooling                                                                                                    |

faqs.question: What Microsoft SQL Server services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: Iseyon offers comprehensive consulting services for Microsoft SQL Server, including database design and architecture, installation and configuration, performance tuning, health checks, development, database administration, disaster recovery planning, upgrades, and SQL training. We deliver end-to-end support to ensure optimal database performance, availability, and scalability.

faqs.question: Does Iseyon provide SQL Server BI and Data Warehousing solutions?
faqs.answer:
Yes, Iseyon delivers Business Intelligence (BI) and data warehousing consulting using Microsoftâ€™s BI stack, including:
SQL Server Integration Services (SSIS)
SQL Server Analysis Services (SSAS)
SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS)

We design scalable data warehouses and analytics environments that enable advanced reporting, multidimensional analysis, and enterprise data integration.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon improve SQL Server performance and reliability?
faqs.answer: Iseyon specializes in SQL Server performance tuning, query optimization, indexing strategies, workload balancing, and server configuration improvements. We conduct detailed health checks to identify bottlenecks and implement proactive monitoring, high availability configurations, and disaster recovery strategies to ensure mission-critical database performance.

faqs.question: Why do organizations choose Microsoft SQL Server?
faqs.answer: Organizations choose Microsoft SQL Server for its strong integration with Microsoft business applications, lower total cost of ownership, enterprise-grade security, scalability, virtualization support, and robust online transaction processing (OLTP) capabilities. It also provides powerful data warehousing and BI tools that support reporting, analytics, and real-time decision-making.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon support SQL Server modernization and upgrades?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, Iseyon assists with SQL Server upgrades, migration planning, legacy modernization, and cloud readiness initiatives. We ensure minimal downtime, improved performance, enhanced security, and alignment with modern data and analytics strategies.
